'''ân-ng-th-s''' ('''kanangthesoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:knapsack|knapsack]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| n-ng-th-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:knapsack|knapsack]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ân-ng-th-s
|-
! Lemma
| kanangthesoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
